MCP Agent Mail CLI (Rust)

Usage: am [COMMAND]

Commands:
  acks                        List and send reminders for pending or overdue message acknowledgements
  agent                       First-turn cockpit for agents: identity, project, runtime hints, and next actions
  agents                      Register, list, and inspect agent identities
  am-run                      Run a command while holding a build-slot file reservation
  amctl                       Low-level control-plane utilities (build-slot environment inspection)
  archive                     Inspect and maintain the Git-backed message/reservation archive
  atc                         ATC maintenance and backfill workflows
  beads                       Query beads (issue tracker) status for the current project
  bench                       Run native CLI benchmarks
  capabilities                Print the machine-readable CLI capabilities contract
  check                       Run the unified local pre-release quality gate
  check-inbox                 Check agent inbox for unread messages (for git hooks and editor integrations)
  ci                          Run CI quality gates (format, lint, build, test)
  clear-and-reset-everything  Destructively wipe all Agent Mail state (optionally archiving first)
  config                      Inspect and edit Agent Mail configuration
  contacts                    Contact request/approve/reject/policy lifecycle
  docs                        Generate and insert Agent Mail documentation blurbs
  doctor                      Diagnose and repair mailbox, archive, and database health
  e2e                         Run E2E test suites
  file_reservations           Reserve, renew, release, and inspect file reservations
  flake-triage                Flake triage: scan artifacts, reproduce failures, detect flaky tests
  golden                      Capture, verify, and inspect deterministic golden CLI artifacts
  guard                       Install, check, and manage the pre-commit file-reservation guard hook
  health                      Direct alias for `am robot health`
  inbox                       Direct alias for `am robot inbox`
  legacy                      Legacy Python installation detection, migration/import, and status
  lint                        Run clippy lints across the workspace (`cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings`)
  list-acks                   List acknowledgement status for an agent's recent messages
  list-projects               List registered projects (optionally including their agents)
  macros                      Composite workflow macros (session boot, thread prep, reservation cycles, contact handshake)
  mail                        Send, read, search, reply to, and replay mailbox messages
  migrate                     Migrate or check the on-disk database format (with backup/rollback)
  products                    Manage product records and link them to projects
  projects                    Manage projects: register, adopt, mark identity, and discovery
  release                     Release readiness evidence and operator verdicts
  reservations                Direct alias for `am robot reservations`
  robot                       Agent-optimized commands with TOON/JSON/Markdown output
  robot-docs                  Agent-targeted CLI docs and copy-paste workflow recipes
  self-update                 Check for updates or self-update the binary
  serve-http                  Run the Agent Mail MCP server over streamable HTTP (with optional TUI)
  serve-stdio                 Run the Agent Mail MCP server over stdio (for direct MCP client launch)
  service                     Cross-platform service management (systemd on Linux, launchd on macOS)
  setup                       Detect coding agents and configure MCP server connections
  share                       Create, inspect, and import encrypted shareable mailbox bundles
  status                      Direct alias for `am robot status`
  thread                      Direct alias for `am robot thread`
  tooling                     Inspect the MCP tool directory, schemas, and call metrics
  tui-dump                    Non-interactive TUI snapshot dump — the freeze escape hatch (I6)
  typecheck                   Type-check the workspace without building binaries (`cargo check --all-targets`)
  upgrade                     Upgrade helper: detect legacy install, import data, refresh setup
  verify                      Run a standard verification lane through build-slot admission and rch
  help                        Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help     Print help
  -V, --version  Print version

MCP tool-name corrections:
  reserve/file-reserve/file_reservation_paths -> am file_reservations reserve <project> <agent> <path> [--exclusive]
  release_file_reservations -> am file_reservations release <project> <agent> [--paths <path>...]
  macro_start_session -> am macros start-session --project <abs-path> --program <program> --model <model>
  send/send-message/send_message -> am mail send --project <project> --from <agent> --to <agent> --subject <subject> --body <markdown>
  inbox/fetch_inbox -> am inbox --project <project> --agent <agent>
  acknowledge_message -> am mail ack --project <project> --agent <agent> <message-id>
  list_agents -> am agents list --project <project>
  whois -> am agents show --project <project> <agent>
  reservations -> am reservations --project <project> --agent <agent>
  serve-http/serve-stdio -> am serve-http ...  OR  am serve-stdio ...
